title: 今だけ！パワースポット

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, when I'm strolling around town, I spot
Matikanefukukitaru rolling a die rather earnestly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, a two... An even number means choosing
the street on the left!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hey there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well you see... last night, a divine
revelation appeared in my dreams!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It just so happens that there's a new, super strong
sacred site around here right now! But its power
will only last a short time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Directions did not come included with the
revelation, but that's no problem! For this lucky
die will lead me to the promised land!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...First, it seems to have led me right to you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... This can be no mere coincidence! I
presume this means you will be the one to guide
me to the site!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please, Trainer! Throw the die and show me the
way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit too late to turn her down, so I guess I'll
give it a go...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A three! An odd number means we go down the
street on the right... That's the way to the station!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So fate desires us to take the train! Come on, let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I can feel it! We're getting closer to the
sacred site! Isn't this exciting?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now to find out which station to get off at. Let us
consult the die!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A one would mean the next station, a two the
station after that, and so on... A six would take us
to the very last stop. I roll the die on the palm of
my hand, which gives me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A one! Then we need to get off at the next sta—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The train suddenly lurches, causing the die to
tumble out of my hand.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Now it's a six!
choice_data_list: Which one do we go with?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm... This is quite the predicament!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you always lead me down the right path!
So please, I ask for you to make the final
decision!
choice_data_list: One. Let's get off at the next station.
Six. Let's stay on until the final stop.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Understood! I can't wait to see what we find!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so this is the sacred site! The mystic energy
here is off the charts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like any other part of town to me, but we
roll the die and keep on walking.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look at that sign! "Holy Smokes Steakhouse"! Is
this one of the area's local delights?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect name for a sacred site! Let's go see
what they have!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, should I eat seven skewers for luck? Or
maybe eight for prosperity!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Check out that big sculpture in front of
the museum!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's reflecting so much light! So sparkly! I
bet it's supercharged with the sun's energy, right
down to the core!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try touching it for some of that
power! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaaand touch!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whew! What a day! I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to take on the world! Now that's the
power of visiting a supercharged,
limited-time-only sacred site!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um... How was today for you, Trainer? I ended up
dragging you around all day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
R-really? I'm happy to hear that! Plus, we got
ourselves a whole lot of power!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There didn't seem to be anything miraculous
about today's events, but Matikanefukukitaru
and I had a great time regardless.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wouldn't mind if more divine revelations
like this came my way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, maybe I shouldn't get too greedy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But... it'd be nice to enjoy ourselves like that
every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, maybe I'll ask Shiraoki for another
revelation before bed tonight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Onward! With you by my side, I can
travel to the ends of the earth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get off at the last stop to find an open,
serene landscape expanding into the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! The air here is so clean and crisp! Even the
great outdoors is flush with power!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I think we're onto something wonderful! Let's go,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I roll the die under her expectant gaze, and we
press on diligently. And on, and on, and on...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, looks like this is the end of the road!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I think this might just be it—the supercharged,
limited-time-only sacred site! Now what miracles
await us?!
choice_data_list: Do you really expect a miracle to happen?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You're the one who led us here, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says this with a smile so bright it makes me
hopeful for a miracle myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what was that sound?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! Look up at the sky! Some kind of light
is coming this way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! Whaaa—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A dazzling light, followed by a thunderous clap,
seizes all my senses...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Did... d-did you see that, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It was a UFO!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It had to be! That was a gift—power from the
cosmos!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to see it clearly for myself, but if
she's happy, who am I to argue?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You really are my destined partner! What an
auspicious event your guidance has brought upon
us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure more amazing things are in store for us if
we stick together! Don't you think?
